post.description:
Authenticate user and return JWT tokens.

- **email**: User's email address
- **password**: User's password
- **remember_me**: If true, extends token expiration
- **mfa_code**: Required if MFA is enabled
Logout user by invalidating their tokens.

Register a new user account.

- Validates password strength
- Sends verification email
- Returns user ID on success
Verify user email with token from email link.
Refresh access token using refresh token.

Request password reset email.

Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.
Confirm password reset with token and new password.

Setup MFA for the authenticated user.
Returns secret and QR code URI.
Verify MFA code to enable MFA.

Disable MFA for the authenticated user.
Requires current MFA code for security.

delete.description:
Delete current user's account.

This is a soft delete - marks account as inactive.

get.description: Get usage statistics and rate limit information for the current user.

post.description: Calculate the price of a single option.
Calculate prices for multiple options in a single request.
Calculate option Greeks (Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega, Rho).
Calculate implied volatility from a market price.

MFASetupResponse.title: MFASetupResponse
MFASetupResponse.description: MFA setup response with secret and QR code.

example.message: Registration successful. Please verify your email.
